[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:19.172510 from 'https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/entire/us-gaap-entryPoint-std-2025.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\NWPP_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0139.9855] The element us-gaap:TierOneLeverageCapitalRequiredForCapitalAdequacyToAverageAssets with a value of 4 has a value greater than 100 percent. The measure us-gaap:TierOneLeverageCapitalRequiredForCapitalAdequacyToAverageAssets should have a value between zero and one as this is reported as a percentage. Check that the value has the appropriate scale. In XBRL files a value of 1 is equivalent to 100%.
Period :2023-12-31 Dimensions : dei:LegalEntityAxis=nwpp:BankMember Unit : pure Decimals: inf
Rule Element Id:9855 Rule version: 29.0.2 - NWPP_instance_2024_2025.xml 14210

property.name: label
property.value: Banking Regulation, Tier 1 Leverage Capital Ratio, Capital Adequacy, Minimum
